prompt: A realistic workshop scene for a Romanian technical article about choosing the correct Tenax stone mastic color and package quantity. Natural stone fabrication workshop in Romania, workbench with marble and granite offcuts, small test coupons, color swatches, mastic containers and spatulas. On the right half, a technician's hands compare cured beige, white, black and transparent mastic samples against marble/granite scraps; no faces. Candid editorial photography, real texture, practical workshop lighting, not glossy advertising. Wide 16:9 frame; left third and lower-left area visually calm and darker for website title overlay; main subject between center-right and right third, not cut off. Neutral stone grey, warm beige, black granite, subtle terracotta workshop accents. No readable labels or brand logos, no impossible tools, no product brand marks, no watermark, no UI elements, no text.
